title: Hold Up Lanterns
description: 3D Held Lanterns in Third Person (with Not Enough Animations support) while maintaining 2D sprites in the UI.
body:
# Hold Up Lanterns
**Hold Up Lanterns is a Resource Pack that changes the held item model of the Lantern in Third Person to the Block model and repositions it to fit snugly in your grip.**

Most Resource Packs should work with Hold Up Lanterns, as the model and textures remain unchanged.


I would heavily recommend a [Dynamic Light](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) mod, as well as [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items).

The positioning of the Lantern is made for [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) by default, but there is an alternative position for Player Animation Resource Packs, such as [Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension) by using [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts).

Compatibility with [Item Interactions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/item-interactions) is also toggleable with [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts).

![Showcase of the Lantern's Held Item Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c84cc2e271a87e623fe8cbad4d9fd1f76452ef76_0.webp)
